data.author: pdixit@insider.com (Pranav Dixit)
data.title: Meta is weighing major layoffs as it pours billions into AI
data.description: Meta plans potential layoffs as AI investments rise, with up to 16,000 jobs at risk. AI spending demands cost cuts across Big Tech.
data.content:
Meta is gearing up for possible layoffs as it pours billions into AI, two senior employees familiar with the matter told Business Insider.
